summary: Tested packing_type and delivery_location (freight pincode) feature across backend API, frontend Quote Details modal, and email templates. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend correctly displays Packing Type and Delivery Pincode in Quote Details modal. PDF export includes these fields in the generated HTML.
passing_tests: POST /api/quotes correctly accepts and stores packing_type field
POST /api/quotes correctly accepts and stores delivery_location field
GET /api/quotes returns quotes with packing_type field
GET /api/quotes returns quotes with delivery_location field
All packing type values work: standard, pallet, wooden_box
6-digit pincode format correctly stored as string
Quote Details modal displays Packing Type with correct labels
Quote Details modal displays Delivery Pincode
PDF export HTML includes Packing Type section
PDF export HTML includes Delivery Pincode
Admin can view customer RFQ packing and delivery details
RFQ notification email template includes packing_type and delivery_location fields
Quote approval email template includes packing_type and delivery_location fields

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Quote Details modal and PDF export verified)

seed_data_creation: 12 test RFQs created with various packing_type and delivery_location combinations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Packing Type and Delivery Location feature is fully implemented and working. Backend stores and retrieves these fields correctly. Frontend Quote Details modal displays them properly. Email templates include these fields. PDF export includes these fields.

backend_model_location.QuoteCreate: server.py lines 326-331 - includes packing_type and delivery_location Optional fields
backend_model_location.Quote: server.py lines 307-308 - includes packing_type and delivery_location fields

backend_api_location.create_quote: server.py lines 2866-2867 - stores packing_type and delivery_location from request

email_template_locations.send_rfq_notification_email: server.py lines 1927-1955 - includes packing_type and delivery_location in admin notification
email_template_locations.send_quote_approval_email: server.py lines 3182-3185 - includes packing_type and delivery_location in approval email

pdf_generation_locations.generate_rfq_html: server.py lines 694-711 - includes packing_type and delivery_location section

frontend_locations.Quote_interface: quotes.tsx lines 64-66 - includes packing_type and delivery_location fields
frontend_locations.Quote_Details_modal: quotes.tsx lines 1662-1689 - displays Packing & Freight section
frontend_locations.PDF_export: quotes.tsx lines 1114-1137 - includes packing_type and delivery_location in PDF HTML
